gw29.disclaimer: This short info is written prior to the full press conferences. Make your move close to the deadline to maximise available information.
general: With FA Cup and European fixtures before Gameweek 30, rolling the transfer is advisable if you can comfortably field a full XI.
transfers: If you have **1 FT**: Hold Haaland, provided you have a reliable bench.
If you have **2 FTs**: Consider moving Haaland to Ekitike and upgrading your budget forward/midfield.
holds: Hold Wilson and Andersen — both are expected to be short-term absences.
chips: Taking hits is more justifiable than activating the Wildcard at this stage; waiting for clearer DGW information carries higher strategic value.
captaincy: Haaland only if his start is confirmed.
